Off Calendar Sep-26-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-26-2005 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Dec-20-05 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as a reassignment from the Master Calendar for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair
Albert Stoll, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Daniel Trujillo, present, and Suchanya Piyamaporn, not present (in Japan, arriving tomorrow). Mr. Stoll, stated in open court, that Plaintiff: Piyamaporn will settled as agreed.
Kevin Gray, Esq. for Defendant: Golden Gate Bridge, Highway and Transportation Distict and authorized to settled the matter.
Parties have settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Settlement in the sum of $13,000.00 for Plaintiff: Trujillo, and $11,000.00 for Plaintiff: Piyamaporn, upon approval by the District. Payment by checks to Mr. Stoll's trust account.
Each to bear own costs and fees.
Parties agreed to terms in open court, matter is deemed settled by the Court and placed on the CRC-225 calendar for Dec. 20, 2005 at 10 a.m. in Dept. 212 for DISMISSAL.
